# Tanner Chiropractic

> Integrated chiropractic, sports medicine, and golf performance care in North Scottsdale, Arizona. Dr. Glen J. Tanner, D.C., C.C.S.M.S., TPI Certified.

Tanner Chiropractic is a private practice in North Scottsdale, Arizona owned and operated by Dr. Glen J. Tanner. Dr. Tanner is a graduate of Palmer College of Chiropractic West with post-graduate certification in Sports Rehabilitation and Physiotherapy from the University of Bridgeport. He has been in practice for over 30 years and has served as physician and corner man for multiple world champion boxers and as physician for world-class and professional golfers. He is TPI Certified at Levels 1 and 2 (Titleist Performance Institute) and developed the Golfer's Edge performance and injury-prevention program for the Desert Mountain Golf Community. He has 62 five-star reviews on his verified Google Business Profile.

Note: Tanner Chiropractic is a separate practice from "Tanner Chiropractic & Acupuncture" (doctortanner.com), which is operated by a different doctor. This site (tannerchiropractic.com) is exclusively for Dr. Glen Tanner.

## Who we serve

- Active adults 50+ in North Scottsdale, Carefree, Cave Creek, and surrounding North Valley communities including Troon, Grayhawk, DC Ranch, Desert Mountain, Pinnacle Peak, and Terravita.
- Golfers (recreational and professional) seeking both injury treatment and swing-related performance work.
- Athletes and weekend warriors with sports and overuse injuries.
- Patients considering surgery who want a thorough non-surgical evaluation first.

## Services

- Chiropractic Care
- Rehabilitation
- Decompression Therapy
- Cold Laser Therapy
- Clinical Pilates
- Personal Training
- Massage Therapy
- TPI Golf Performance & Injury Prevention (Golfer's Edge program)

## Conditions we treat

Lower back pain, sciatica, neck pain, migraines, shoulder and rotator cuff pain, knee and IT band pain, golf injury and swing-related dysfunction, sports and overuse injuries, postural and desk-job pain, post-surgical recovery.

## What makes us different

Most chiropractic offices offer adjustments and refer out for everything else. Tanner Chiropractic keeps eight coordinated services under one roof, run by one doctor who knows what the others did. Adjustments address the immediate restriction; rehabilitation, decompression therapy, cold laser, clinical Pilates, personal training, and massage therapy address the muscle imbalances, postural dysfunction, and movement patterns that caused the problem.

## Practice details

- **Phone:** (480) 595-6101 (answered in person Mon–Fri during office hours)
- **Address:** 33755 N. Scottsdale Rd, Suite 101 A, Scottsdale, AZ 85266
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 7:00am–12:00pm and 2:00pm–6:00pm. Closed Saturday and Sunday.
- **New patient exam:** $49 (full evaluation, movement screen, and written treatment plan)
- **Website:** https://tannerchiropractic.com

## Condition detail pages

- [Lower Back Pain](https://tannerchiropractic.com/lower-back-pain.html) — disc, facet, SI joint, core weakness, hip mobility causes; treated with adjustments, decompression therapy, soft tissue, rehabilitation, personal training, and clinical Pilates.
- [Sciatica](https://tannerchiropractic.com/sciatica.html) — caused by disc herniation, piriformis syndrome, SI joint dysfunction, or lumbar facet irritation. Treated with decompression therapy for disc cases, soft tissue and trigger point for piriformis, adjustments for joint cases, cold laser for inflammation, rehabilitation and Pilates for the cause.
- [Neck Pain & Migraines](https://tannerchiropractic.com/neck-pain.html) — forward head posture, whiplash, cervicogenic headache, cervical radiculopathy. Treated with cervical/thoracic adjustment, soft tissue, cervical decompression for radiculopathy, cold laser, and postural retraining.
- [Shoulder & Rotator Cuff Pain](https://tannerchiropractic.com/shoulder-pain.html) — rotator cuff strain, impingement, frozen shoulder, AC joint, biceps tendinitis, referred from neck. Treated with thoracic/shoulder adjustment, massage therapy, cold laser, clinical Pilates, and rotator cuff & scapular rehabilitation.
- [Golf Injury & Swing Correction](https://tannerchiropractic.com/golf-injury.html) — Dr. Tanner is TPI Certified Level 1 and 2, developed the Golfer's Edge program at Desert Mountain, and has served as physician for world-class and professional golfers. Treats lumbar, hip, shoulder, elbow, wrist, and knee injuries common to golfers, plus the underlying swing fault and body limitations.
